did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Elmer Leo Lockwood cemetery records and genealogy,
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Microfilm of tombstone inscriptions for the Town of Caroline, New York. Also, Mr. Lockwood's correspondence and research materials concerning the genealogy of the Lockwood and related families. Also, a typed report on Moses DeWitt.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Microfilm of tombstone inscriptions for the Town of Caroline, Tompkins County, New York. Also, Mr. Lockwood's correspondence and research materials concerning the genealogy of the Lockwood and related families, including cemetery records from Honeoye Falls and Lima, and notes from churches and public records in Dutchess, Livingston, Monroe, and Ulster Counties. Also, a typed report on Moses DeWitt written by Myron Melvin, 1933.

unittitle.extref: Link to a partial finding aid.

scopecontent.p: All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Elmer Leo Lockwood cemetery records and genealogy, #2167. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
